title: Attachments in emails not coming through
excerpt: When we forward an email to a board, the attachments are not coming through. The text of the email is in the update section, but no attachments. Is this really not an available option?

posts.author: LegalPM (Wanda)
posts.cookedHtml: When we forward an email to a board, the attachments are not coming through. The text of the email is in the update section, but no attachments. Is this really not an available option?

posts.author: Admeirel (Adolpho Meirelles)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m also having this problem.

@Dani could you help us with this please?
